title: Kerala High Court stays 'dry day' order at Kerala–TN border ahead of Tamil Nadu polls
description: The Kerala High Court on Tuesday stayed a State government order imposing 'dry days' in areas within 5 kilometres of the Kerala-Tamil Nadu border ahead of the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections scheduled for April 23, 2026 [James v State of Kerala & ors].A Vacation Bench of Justice S Manu observed that the State's order was issued without any authority of law and could not be justified.The Court noted that Section 135C of the Representation of the People Act, 1951 (prohibition of liquor sale duri
